Instructions for unit testing JavaScript code in the sdk/include directory using Mocha.

# Purpose
The document provides instructions for unit testing JavaScript code located in the `sdk/include` directory. It outlines the steps to install necessary dependencies by navigating to the `sdk/tests/include` directory and executing `npm install`. To run the tests, users should execute `npm test`, which utilizes the Mocha test runner to execute the test scripts. The document also includes guidance on linting the test code using `npm run-script lint` and provides instructions for adding new test files in the `tests` folder. It advises using the `pebble-mock.js` file for mocking the global `Pebble` object and emphasizes the importance of adding new dependencies to the `devDependencies` section of the `package.json` file using `npm install --save-dev`.
